overall.description: A cinematic drive through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning at a neon-lit intersection and progressing through futuristic boulevards, covered transit tunnels, and dense urban canyons with massive holographic billboards. The footage showcases ray-traced lighting and dense cyberpunk architecture with heavy vehicle traffic.

exits intersection and enters multi-lane futuristic boulevard

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a futuristic urban intersection dominated by a colorful spiral neon building on the left and a large red holographic billboard ahead. The ego vehicle accelerates from a stop and drives through the intersection, following a red car while passing concrete traffic pillars and illuminated advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic boulevard with holographic advertisements and elevated highways

events.description: passing under an overpass causes brief shadow and lighting shift
approaching the entrance to a covered transit tunnel with glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: cruising down a multi-lane street lined with colorful holographic billboards and elevated roadways

notable_agents.action: red car maintaining position ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: multi-level highway structure crossing above the street
floating digital displays projecting product advertisements
tall skyscrapers with reflective glass facades

segments.scene_description: Driving along a futuristic boulevard, the colorful spiral neon building now looms large on the left while elevated highways cross overhead. The vehicle passes under an overpass causing a brief shadow, then approaches the entrance to a covered tunnel structure. Holographic advertisements float on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit tunnel with geometric glass ceiling and blue neon lighting

events.description: enters covered tunnel with geometric glass ceiling structure
exiting the tunnel back into open air and dusk lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through a futuristic covered highway with illuminated blue structural elements and geometric glass ceiling

notable_agents.action: red car maintaining speed through the covered section

entered.detail: triangular glass panel ceiling with metal framework allowing limited sky visibility
horizontal blue illuminated strips lining the tunnel walls
large structural arch marking the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered transit tunnel featuring a striking geometric glass ceiling with triangular panels and blue neon light strips lining the walls. The lighting shifts to artificial blue tones as the car drives through the enclosed space, then begins to exit back into the open air as the tunnel ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with massive holographic billboards and multi-level overpasses

events.description: emerges into massive urban canyon with giant Kiroshi holographic billboard dominating the right side
passing yellow warning signs indicating restricted zone beyond this point
vehicle navigates through complex multi-level overpass interchange

agents.ego_description: navigating through heavy traffic in a dense futuristic city center with towering advertisements and complex overpass systems

notable_agents.action: black car overtaking on the right side
red car continuing to lead through the downtown canyon

entered.detail: massive building-sized holographic advertisement showing a face with the text Kiroshi
bright yellow banners with black warning text covering the left wall
complex network of elevated highways and train tracks crossing at multiple levels

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a massive urban canyon, the scene is dominated by the giant Kiroshi holographic billboard on the right. The vehicle drives past yellow warning signs on the left indicating a restricted zone, while navigating through dense traffic and complex multi-level overpasses that crisscross overhead. The street is lined with towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in digital advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-drenched metropolis that transitions from an open intersection into a futuristic transit tunnel before emerging into a towering urban canyon. It begins at a vibrant intersection dominated by a spiral neon building and a red holographic billboard, accelerating forward past concrete pillars and illuminated advertisements. As the vehicle proceeds along a boulevard, the camera passes under the shadow of an overhead highway and glides past floating holograms before entering a covered tunnel. The environment then shifts to artificial blue tones beneath a geometric glass ceiling with triangular panels, maintaining a steady pace until the vehicle exits the enclosed space. Finally, the scene opens into a massive canyon of skyscrapers where the camera drives past yellow restricted zone signs and under complex multi-level overpasses, dominated by a giant Kiroshi holographic billboard.
